news.t: Microsoft Woes Hide Opportunity With This ETF
Big Tech's AI Bets Pay Off: How to Play Latest Earnings

holdings.infoBox: MSFU is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings. The top holdings are Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 stock at 41.63%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 26.55%, Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 22.37%, Microsoft at 14.94%, and Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 4.00%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily MSFT Bull 2X ETF (MSFU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Microsoft stock. MSFU was launched on Sep 7, 2022 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Direxion's Dave Mazza delivers insights behind single-stock ETFs
data.text: Dave Mazza, Direxion head of product, joins the 'Halftime Report' to discuss single-stock ETFs, who is investing in the product and what they're doing with them.
